query:
SELECT c.name, bi.description, bi.lineAmount
FROM customers c
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.externalId IN ('C0138', 'C0008', 'C0059', 'C0160', 'C0243', 'C0155')
ORDER BY c.name, bi.lineAmount DESC
